_meta.description: Curated meta builds catalog. Hand-built from public sources (snowcrows.com / hardstuck.gg / discretize.eu) with attribution; live scraping is not done out of respect for those sites' robots policies. To add a build: copy its chat code in-game (Hero panel → Build template → right-click the slot → Copy Chat Code) and paste it here.
